message:
feat(ui): live Rust-backed demo + README screenshot

The UI is now a live view of the real LIF engine. The previous Web-
Worker synthetic simulator is gone; every spike, every λ₂ value, every
community snapshot comes from the Rust backend
(examples/connectome-fly/src/bin/ui_server.rs) over SSE.

Proof in the screenshot:
- Top-bar engine tag: rust-lif crate=0.1.0 n=1024 modules=70 witness=N
- The witness is a per-process boot counter — no static mock can match
- window._real_spikes_total climbs into 100s of thousands in ~5s
- Validated with agent-browser: zero console errors across full tour

Also updated:
- "95 tests" → "97 tests" (current branch head)
- "20 measurement-driven discoveries" → "26"
- Narrative updated for the N=512/modules=20/γ=4.0 CPM ceiling
  (0.599 full-ARI, 1.25× gap to 0.75 SOTA — down from 1.76× at N=1024)

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -2,9 +2,13 @@
 
 **A debugging and control layer for embodied graph systems whose structure is *knowable* — the connectome — rather than learned.**
 
+![Connectome OS UI — live Rust LIF backend](docs/screenshots/ui-live-rust-backend.png)
+
+*Live screenshot: the browser is downstream of the real Rust LIF engine. The top-bar "engine" tag shows `rust-lif crate=0.1.0 n=1024 modules=70 witness=…` — the **witness is a per-process boot counter**, so a static mock could never reproduce it. Every spike in the raster, every value in the λ₂ plot, and every community snapshot is produced by [`examples/connectome-fly/src/bin/ui_server.rs`](https://github.com/ruvnet/RuVector/blob/research/connectome-ruvector/examples/connectome-fly/src/bin/ui_server.rs) running the actual `Engine` + `Observer` + CPM-Leiden code, streamed to the browser over SSE. Validated end-to-end with [agent-browser](https://npmjs.com/agent-browser): zero console errors across a full interactive tour, `window._real_spikes_total` advances into the hundreds-of-thousands of real spikes inside 5 seconds.*
+
 "OS" in the Linux sense: infrastructure for introspection and intervention, not a mystical claim about emergent mind. Not mind upload. Not digital consciousness. Not AGI. Connectome OS is the graph-native runtime that mounts on top of a connectome + a spiking engine and lets you **probe, perturb, and reason about the structure — cut the wiring, measure the fracture, ask what substructure carried the failure.**
 
-> ⚠️ **Alpha / research preview.** Connectome OS is in active development on the [`research/connectome-ruvector`](https://github.com/ruvnet/RuVector/tree/research/connectome-ruvector) branch. The Tier-1 fly-scale demonstrator (`examples/connectome-fly/`) is shipped and all 95 tests pass; the production `ruvector-connectome` / `ruvector-lif` / `ruvector-embodiment` crates, real FlyWire v783 data ingest, MuJoCo-based embodiment, and Tier-2 mouse-scale substrate are **named follow-ups, not shipped**. APIs may change. Measured numbers, missed SOTA targets, and reverted follow-up levers are documented honestly in [ADR-154 §17](https://github.com/ruvnet/RuVector/blob/research/connectome-ruvector/docs/adr/ADR-154-connectome-embodied-brain-example.md) (**20 measurement-driven discoveries preserved**, including the 4-for-20 orthogonal-axis win pattern and the CPM-Leiden 3.97× win over modularity-Leiden on the default SBM). Use in research and internal tooling; hold on anything that expects a stable API contract.
+> ⚠️ **Alpha / research preview.** Connectome OS is in active development on the [`research/connectome-ruvector`](https://github.com/ruvnet/RuVector/tree/research/connectome-ruvector) branch. The Tier-1 fly-scale demonstrator (`examples/connectome-fly/`) is shipped and all 97 tests pass; the production `ruvector-connectome` / `ruvector-lif` / `ruvector-embodiment` crates, real FlyWire v783 data ingest, MuJoCo-based embodiment, and Tier-2 mouse-scale substrate are **named follow-ups, not shipped**. APIs may change. Measured numbers, missed SOTA targets, and reverted follow-up levers are documented honestly in [ADR-154 §17](https://github.com/ruvnet/RuVector/blob/research/connectome-ruvector/docs/adr/ADR-154-connectome-embodied-brain-example.md) (**26 measurement-driven discoveries preserved**, including the 4-for-26 orthogonal-axis win pattern, the CPM-Leiden 3.97× win over modularity-Leiden on the default SBM, and the new CPM ceiling of 0.599 full-ARI at N=512 / num_modules=20 / γ=4.0 — narrowing the AC-3a gap to 1.25× the 0.75 SOTA target). Use in research and internal tooling; hold on anything that expects a stable API contract.
 
 - Source code: [ruvnet/RuVector @ `research/connectome-ruvector`](https://github.com/ruvnet/RuVector/tree/research/connectome-ruvector)
 - Working example (Tier-1 fruit fly): [`examples/connectome-fly/`](https://github.com/ruvnet/RuVector/tree/research/connectome-ruvector/examples/connectome-fly)
